about.title: Meet the founders who combine decades of experience with a vision for the future

founder1.name: Renato de Faria e Almeida Prado
founder1.bio: With nearly 30 years of experience in boards, innovation, and purpose-driven leadership, Renato combines a rare strategic vision with the ability to translate complexity into action. Co-founder of 10xMentorAI and IMENSIAH, he works at the intersection of governance and artificial intelligence, helping leaders apply technology with wisdom — not just speed. His mission is clear: to make companies and leaders more human, sustainable, and exponential, uniting experience, intuition, and AI in a single flow of intelligent decision-making.

founder2.name: Daniela de Luca Brandão
founder2.bio: A specialist in strategy, management, process architecture, and finance, Daniela is the analytical and creative force behind IMENSIAH. Her journey combines structured reasoning and critical thinking with a human and innovative approach to solving complex problems. At IMENSIAH, she leads the integration between operational efficiency and strategic intelligence, ensuring that each solution is precise, practical, and oriented toward real results.

founder3.name: Renato DAP
founder3.bio: Engineer and developer specialized in artificial intelligence and full-stack systems. Currently pursuing Computer Science with a focus on Deep Learning and AI Research at Rose-Hulman Institute of Technology, he combines technical AI expertise (GPT-4, RAG, PyTorch) with practical development skills (Next.js, React Native, Golang). Creator of innovative solutions that unite technology and real impact, from voice-controlled culinary assistants to adaptive AI fitness platforms. At IMENSIAH, he leads the technical implementation of artificial intelligence solutions, ensuring that technology serves strategy with excellence and innovation.

formUnavailable.title: Coming Soon to Your Region
formUnavailable.message: Our strategic analysis service is currently available only in Brazil. We're working to expand to other regions soon.

landing.heroDescription: Transform raw data into executive-level strategic decisions in 48 hours. The platform that combines analytical rigor with exponential speed.
landing.problemsSubtitle: In a volatile market, slow decisions are bad decisions. SMEs and Mid-Market companies face structural challenges invisible until it's too late.
landing.problem1Desc: Without real-time data, strategy becomes merely a response to crises, never an anticipation of opportunities.
landing.problem2Desc: Scarce resources are diluted in low-impact initiatives due to lack of clarity on what really moves the needle.
landing.problem3Desc: While you look inward, the market changes outside. The lack of market intelligence creates fatal vulnerabilities.
landing.solutionSubtitle: Not just analytics. Not just AI. A complete operating system for high-level decisions.
landing.pipelineSubtitle: Each framework feeds the next, creating cumulative strategic reasoning that reduces noise and eliminates bias.
landing.stat1Desc: 95% reduction in analysis time compared to traditional consultancies.
landing.stat2Desc: More precise decisions avoid waste and focus on real growth levers.
landing.stat3Desc: Anonymized data treated with enterprise compliance rigor.
landing.futureDescription: We're building the definitive "Executive Decision Engine". With integration of your internal data (P&L, CRM, ERP), ImensIAH evolves from a point diagnosis to a continuous operating system.
landing.pilotSubtitle: Join the exclusive group of Founding Advisors and get priority access to the platform.
landing.formDisclaimer: Your data is secure. Enterprise Compliance.

metodologia.title: Strategic Pipeline
metodologia.subtitle: A 12-step analytical framework that transforms raw data into executive strategic decisions. Each step feeds the next, creating compounding value.
metodologia.step0Desc: Intelligent collection and aggregation of internal and external data. LLM orchestrates primary and secondary sources.
metodologia.step1Desc: Mapping of macro forces that affect or may affect the sector and the company. Focus on trends and regulatory changes.
metodologia.step2Desc: Extended competitive analysis: direct rivals, substitutes, new entrants, supplier power, buyer power + ecosystems + regulation.
metodologia.step3Desc: Cross-analysis of internal (strengths/weaknesses) and external (opportunities/threats) factors with confidence level.
metodologia.step4Desc: Technical comparison of products, pricing, positioning, and market share with direct and indirect competitors.
metodologia.step5Desc: Market sizing: Total Available Market, Serviceable Available, and realistically Obtainable, with explicit assumptions.
metodologia.step6Desc: Strategy canvas identifying unexplored spaces and eliminating/reducing/raising/creating factors.
metodologia.step7Desc: Mapping of organic and viral growth levers, retention loops, and referral mechanisms.
metodologia.step8Desc: Construction of 3-5 alternative futures with trigger events, probabilities, and recommended actions.
metodologia.step9Desc: Definition of Objectives and Key Results aligned to strategic priorities, with clear measurement.
metodologia.step10Desc: Prioritization of initiatives using impact vs. effort criteria, with weighted scoring.
metodologia.step11Desc: Consolidation of strategy into four BSC perspectives: Financial, Customer, Internal Processes, Learning & Growth.

desafios.title: Challenges & Roadmap
desafios.subtitle: We are intentionally clear about what we solve today, where we are going, and what remains outside our scope.
desafios.limitSubtitle: We are intentionally focused. These areas require different data and infrastructure.
desafios.limit1: Real-time internal P&L analysis (requires ERP integration)
desafios.limit2: Automated cash flow predictions (requires historical data)

modelo.title: Revenue Streams
modelo.subtitle: A flexible model designed to scale from individual diagnostics to continuous enterprise engagement.
modelo.model1Desc: Complete 12-step analysis for a specific strategic challenge. Ideal for validation or pivoting moments.
modelo.model2Desc: Quarterly analysis cycles with continuous monitoring. For companies in structured growth.
modelo.model3Desc: Monthly strategic sessions with platform-powered insights. Fractional CISO level.
modelo.model4Desc: White-label integration for consulting firms and accelerators. Volume pricing.
modelo.timingSubtitle: Three converging forces create the perfect window for intelligent strategic platforms.
modelo.promiseText: CFO-Grade Forecast + CEO-Grade Clarity — in 48 hours.
modelo.force1Desc: Large Language Models finally deliver reliable, nuanced strategic analysis at scale.
modelo.force2Desc: Public and semi-public data sources have exploded in coverage and quality.
modelo.force3Desc: Traditional consultancies remain slow and expensive. In-house teams lack bandwidth.

seguranca.title: Security & Compliance
seguranca.subtitle: Your data is treated with the same rigor as financial institutions. We don't cut corners.
seguranca.feature1Desc: We use AI models that do not train on input data. Your strategic information never improves competitor analysis.
seguranca.feature2Desc: Each client operates in a logically separated environment. No data mixing, no cross-contamination.
seguranca.feature3Desc: Only essential personnel access client data. Audit logs track every interaction.
seguranca.feature4Desc: Data encrypted in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256). Keys managed by HSM.
seguranca.complianceSubtitle: We align with the most demanding frameworks. Continuous improvement.
seguranca.compliance1Desc: Full compliance with Brazilian data protection law. DPO designated.
seguranca.compliance2Desc: Audit in progress. Security, availability, and confidentiality controls.
seguranca.compliance3Desc: Retention policies, access controls, and incident response procedures documented.
